PXL_20260501_084628181.jpg.label: Crime scene: cake versus colony
PXL_20260501_084628181.jpg.summary: An abandoned takeaway box of pastries on the office table, swarmed by ants. A toasted-meringue cupcake stands in the background; a butter knife rests across the foreground.

PXL_20260501_084632998.jpg.label: Bread foragers
PXL_20260501_084632998.jpg.summary: Close-up of dozens of black ants moving over the crust and crumb of an abandoned piece of bread.

PXL_20260501_084704792.MP.jpg.label: The siege of the meringue
PXL_20260501_084704792.MP.jpg.summary: A toasted-meringue cupcake sits on a paper tray, ringed by ants advancing across the table from every direction.

PXL_20260501_084712249.jpg.label: Lavender blueberry muffin, half claimed
PXL_20260501_084712249.jpg.summary: A bitten-into iced blueberry muffin scattered with lavender flowers, with ants picking through the crumbs around it.

PXL_20260501_084729083.MP.jpg.label: Ants on the wire
PXL_20260501_084729083.MP.jpg.summary: A trail of ants funnels along a white cable strung across the corner of a wall, a single scout breaking off across the open paintwork.

PXL_20260501_084743030.jpg.label: Yellow hill
PXL_20260501_084743030.jpg.summary: Macro shot of ants climbing a mound of bright yellow custard or icing, with one outlier approaching a stray crumb.

PXL_20260501_085923285.MP.jpg.label: Crime scene briefing
PXL_20260501_085923285.MP.jpg.summary: Three Cogapp colleagues stand by the kitchen window, conferring over the ant-besieged baked goods. A 1000-piece jigsaw lies half-finished on a side table.

PXL_20260501_085945425.jpg.label: Inspecting the evidence
PXL_20260501_085945425.jpg.summary: Two colleagues lean in over the kitchen counter to examine the food and ants while a third stands back, smiling at the camera.

PXL_20260501_090204008.jpg.label: View from HQ
PXL_20260501_090204008.jpg.summary: Looking out of the office window onto Brighton's Preston Road, with a blue 'Unsuitable for HGVs' sign and a long line of ants tracking up the inside of the window frame.

PXL_20260501_090226764.jpg.label: Highway in the ceiling
PXL_20260501_090226764.jpg.summary: Ants marching along the join between wall and ceiling beside a hanging fabric-covered cable — the colony's preferred indoor motorway.

PXL_20260501_084634336.mp4.label: Feast in motion (i)
PXL_20260501_084634336.mp4.summary: Ants swarming across the surface of a cake, captured at close range.

PXL_20260501_084640661.mp4.label: Feast in motion (ii)
PXL_20260501_084640661.mp4.summary: Continued macro footage of ants criss-crossing the iced cake.

PXL_20260501_084651648.mp4.label: Across the worktop
PXL_20260501_084651648.mp4.summary: Wider shot of dozens of ants spread across the white kitchen worktop around the food containers.

PXL_20260501_084720030.mp4.label: iPad invaders
PXL_20260501_084720030.mp4.summary: Ants streaming under the edge of an iPad and along the lip of the table — clearly the most charged spot in the office.
